spec_match.rationale: Perfect usage of light-dark() inside background-image to swap inline SVG assets dynamically depending on the color scheme.

interactive.rationale: Allows toggling the color-scheme native state (Auto, Forced Light, Forced Dark) with instant card updating.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The parent blurb and concept comments now describe the actual background-image implementation on inline icon elements.

edge_cases.rationale: Demonstrates three distinct types of icon swaps (Sun/Moon theme icon, semantic Check/X state, and stroke color adaption for a Doc icon).

references.rationale: Includes the required ChromeStatus reference link.

design_system.rationale: Clean implementation adhering to design system guidelines, including accessible aria-labels on the icon spans.

summary: A highly clear and accessible icon swap demo demonstrating the flexibility of light-dark() with background SVGs, with the surrounding copy aligned to the actual background-image implementation.
